allow: PowerShell($timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd-HHmm"; $src = "C:\\Users\\Shadow\\Documents\\galerie-orfevres-backup-20260507-2350"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\Shadow\\Documents\\galerie-orfevres-backup-polish-$timestamp"; Write-Output "Source: $src"; Write-Output "Destination: $dst"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Write-Output "Le dossier de backup existe deja, on l'utilise." } else { Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dst -Recurse -Exclude @\('node_modules','dist','.astro'\) -Force; Write-Output "Backup cree." }; Get-ChildItem $dst | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)
